---
name: Data correction
about: A coordinate, status, or source on the map looks wrong
title: "[data] "
labels: data
---

**What looks wrong**
The layer and the specific feature (name, area, or location).

**Why you think so**
A short explanation.

**Source**
A link to the original source that supports the correction. This is the most
important part: we verify against the provider before changing anything.

**Screenshot or coordinates (optional)**
